# GUI Documentation Images

These image files are embedded by `docs/guides/gui.md`. Keep the filenames stable so the docs continue to render without further page edits.

- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-main-window.png`
- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-shared-memory-dialog.png`
- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-kernel-dialog.png`
- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-runtime-status.png`
- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-synthetic-input-dialog.png`
- `docs/_static/images/gui/gui-viewer-window.png`
